_README: Fill this file after triage. It drives contractor-bid build-packets. Page numbers are 1-based PDF page numbers, not sheet numbers. pdf_page accepts 12, "12", "12-14", "12,15", or a list.
bid_decision_summary: TBD. Plain-English first-pass summary: what the project appears to require, where the best markup/detail/spec pages are, what to open first, what is in base scope, and what is excluded or needs clarification.
